---
pagetitle: "Feature Engineering A-Z | Image, Greyscale conversion"
image: social-cards/image-grayscale.png
---

# 🏗️ Greyscale conversion {#sec-image-grayscale}

::: {style="visibility: hidden; height: 0px;"}
## Greyscale conversion
:::

WIP

## Pros and Cons

### Pros

### Cons

## R Examples

## Python Examples
